parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO content_ideas (title, category, concept, visual_description, target_audience, tone, content_type, status)
VALUES (
'{{ ($json.title || "").toString().split("'").join("''") }}',
'{{ ($json.category || "").toString().split("'").join("''") }}',
'{{ ($json.concept || "").toString().split("'").join("''") }}',
'{{ ($json.visual_description || "").toString().split("'").join("''") }}',
'{{ ($json.target_audience || "").toString().split("'").join("''") }}',
'{{ ($json.tone || "").toString().split("'").join("''") }}',
'{{ $json.content_type || "regular" }}',
'draft'
)
RETURNING id, title, category, concept, visual_description, target_audience, tone, content_type, status, created_at;

=INSERT INTO voice_scripts (idea_id, script_text, word_count, duration_hint, timing_marks, montage_script, status)
VALUES (
{{ $json.idea_id }},
'{{ ($json.script_text || "").toString().split("'").join("''") }}',
{{ $json.word_count || 0 }},
{{ $json.duration_hint || 0 }},
'{{ JSON.stringify($json.timing_marks || []).split("'").join("''") }}'::jsonb,
'{{ JSON.stringify($json.montage_script || []).split("'").join("''") }}'::jsonb,
'draft'
)
RETURNING id, idea_id, script_text, word_count, duration_hint, status;

=INSERT INTO video_prompts (idea_id, prompt_text, scene_descriptions, style_reference, status)
VALUES (
{{ $json.idea_id }},
'{{ ($json.prompt_text || "").toString().split("'").join("''") }}',
'{{ JSON.stringify($json.scene_descriptions || []).split("'").join("''") }}'::jsonb,
'{{ ($json.style_reference || "").toString().split("'").join("''") }}',
'draft'
)
RETURNING id, idea_id, prompt_text, style_reference, status;

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { count: 3, system_prompt: '', product_name: '', niche: '', extra_instructions: '', content_type: 'a2e_product', script_template: 'auto' } }];
